title: Wind Energy Operations Managers
description: Manage wind field operations, including personnel, maintenance activities, financial activities, and planning.

tasks.text: Supervise employees or subcontractors to ensure quality of work or adherence to safety regulations or policies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train or coordinate the training of employees in operations, safety, environmental issues, or technical issues.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Track and maintain records for wind operations, such as site performance, downtime events, parts usage, or substation events.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Oversee the maintenance of wind field equipment or structures, such as towers, transformers, electrical collector systems, roadways, or other site assets.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop relationships and communicate with customers, site managers, developers, land owners, authorities, utility representatives, or residents.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain operations records, such as work orders, site inspection forms, or other documentation.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Recruit or select wind operations employees, contractors, or subcontractors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide technical support to wind field customers, employees, or subcontractors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Estimate costs associated with operations, including repairs or preventive maintenance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor and maintain records of daily facility operations.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Establish goals, objectives, or priorities for wind field operations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Order parts, tools, or equipment needed to maintain, restore, or improve wind field operations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review, negotiate, or approve wind farm contracts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Manage warranty repair or replacement services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop processes or procedures for wind operations, including transitioning from construction to commercial operations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
